steps.title: Step 1: Start Concurrent Transactions
steps.content: Start Transaction A and Transaction B.

steps.title: Step 2: Acquire Locks
steps.content: Have Transaction A lock Row 1, and Transaction B lock Row 2.

steps.title: Step 3: Create Circular Wait
steps.content: Have Transaction A request a lock on Row 2, and Transaction B request a lock on Row 1.

steps.title: Step 4: Observe Deadlock Detection
steps.content: Watch the DBMS detect the deadlock and abort one transaction.

expectedOutcomes: Understanding of how locks prevent concurrency anomalies but can lead to deadlocks.
